ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Duncan Carling, Esq. for Defendant; No appearance by Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JUN-11-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Continued To Apr-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Duncan Carling for Defendant. No other appearances. Counsel represented to the Court that a dismissal of this case has been filed on 1/15/13. The courtroom checked the register of action and found no such filing but will verify such filing. The court ordered this case off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610) (After hearing, the courtroom verified with the filing clerk on the filing of the dismissal and was informed that the filing was rejected; therefore, there is no dismissal in this case. The court will continue the OSC to APR-09-2013 for the status of arbritation or filing of the dismissal.)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Duncan Carling, Esq. for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Feb-26-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
